expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Uses numbered sections (1-16) with no P-XXX IDs, custom structure instead of boost template
Comprehensive coverage of guide principles with direct quotes from the source

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: References specific skills with per-skill improvement tables, but file paths less specific

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: Includes before/after examples, XML tag snippets, and directly usable prompt snippets from the guide
Single analysis voice, no expert panel or multi-perspective analysis

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: No section for ideas considered but rejected
